visual_description: A blond-haired man in a dark coat peeks from behind a stone column, eyes wide and looking forward. He then turns and runs as two men in dark suits crouch and move stealthily through a dimly lit stone corridor. The camera follows a cloaked figure slipping past a wall in the shadows.
